meta.title: El Entrenamiento Invisible
meta.subtitle: Una filosofia Actimax para rendir mejor, todos los dias

toneOfVoice.pattern: Short declarative sentences, rhetorical questions, power phrases

products.name: Protein Bar Actimax
products.context: Carry as daily snack for consistent nutrition

level1_core: The 80/20 split concept (invisible vs visible training)
level2_pillars: Each pillar with its before/during/after protocol
Mini habits as actionable takeaways per pillar
contentHierarchy.narrativeArc: Problem (training hard isn't enough) -> Framework (80/20 invisible training) -> System (5 pillars) -> Action (mini habits per pillar) -> Commitment (closing CTA)

sections.title: El Entrenamiento Invisible
sections.subtitle: Una filosofia Actimax para rendir mejor, todos los dias

interactiveOpportunities.description: Animated scroll indicator inviting user to begin the journey
Title words reveal one by one, emphasizing 'invisible' with a glow or fade effect

content.mainMessage: You train hard, you push beyond limits. But there's something you can't see that determines your results: nutrition, rest, and mindset.
content.keyPhrase: No hay formulas magicas. Hay estrategia. Hay conciencia. Hay habitos.

interactiveOpportunities.description: The three key words (estrategia, conciencia, habitos) appear sequentially with emphasis animation

content.definition: Actions outside physical training that determine how you perform.
content.coreInsight: Entrenar mas no garantiza rendir mejor. La clave esta en entrenar con energia.
content.keyQuote: El cuerpo ejecuta, si, pero lo hace guiado por la mente y limitado por la energia que lo sostiene.
content.conceptualModel: Body executes -> Mind guides -> Energy sustains

interactiveOpportunities.description: Concentric circles or flow diagram showing body/mind/energy relationship. User taps each layer to reveal description.

content.closingLine: Esto no es algo que simplemente aparece, se entrena.

interactiveOpportunities.description: Donut chart that animates from 0% to 80/20 split on scroll. Each segment is tappable to reveal its sub-items.
User can toggle between 'visible' and 'invisible' items, items fly in/out of chart segments

pillars.name: Nutricion diaria que sostiene tu cuerpo

content.closingLine: No necesitas hacerlo perfecto. Necesitas hacerlo con intencion.

interactiveOpportunities.description: 5 pillar cards arranged as selectable tiles. Each card has an icon, number, name. Tap to navigate to that pillar's detail section. Could animate as stacking blocks.
As user explores each pillar, a progress indicator fills up (1/5, 2/5, etc.) encouraging them to complete all 5

before.label: Antes
before.instruction: 2-3 vasos de agua 2 horas antes del entrenamiento

after.label: Despues
after.instruction: Rehidratar hasta que la orina sea clara

miniHabit.label: Mini habito
miniHabit.instruction: Lleva siempre tu termo. 500ml por hora de actividad.

interactiveOpportunities.description: Horizontal scrollable timeline with 3 phases. Each phase card expands on tap to show detail and product recommendation.
Simple calculator: input training duration -> outputs total ml needed (duration x 500ml). Shows how many bottles of Elite Actimax that equals.
Tappable checkbox for 'I have my thermos today' micro-commitment

before.label: Antes
before.instruction: Carbohidratos de absorcion rapida 30 minutos antes

during.label: Durante
during.instruction: Despues de 40 minutos la energia baja. 1 gel cada 30-40 minutos.

miniHabit.label: Mini habito
miniHabit.instruction: Planifica tu duracion. 1 gel cada 30-40 min. 500-600ml de bebida por hora.

interactiveOpportunities.description: Same timeline pattern as hydration, with energy-themed colors. Each phase shows the product and timing.
Interactive planner: input training duration -> outputs how many gels needed, when to take each one, and total drink volume. Example: 2hr session = 3 gels at min 40, 70, 100 + 1-1.2L drink.
Animated graph showing energy curve: flat for 40 min then dropping, with gel intake points restoring the curve. Visualizes why gels matter.
Tappable checkbox for planning checklist: 'Pre-workout ready', 'Gels packed', 'Recovery planned'

recommendations.instruction: Reduce pantallas 30 minutos antes de dormir

breathingExercise.label: Rutina de respiracion de 5 minutos
breathingExercise.approximateDuration: ~1 minute for 4 cycles, repeat sets to fill 5 min

miniHabit.label: Mini habito
miniHabit.instruction: Rutina de respiracion de 5 minutos antes de dormir

interactiveOpportunities.description: FLAGSHIP INTERACTIVE: Animated breathing guide. Circle expands (inhale 4s) -> pauses (hold 2s) -> contracts (exhale 6s). Visual + optional haptic. Counts 4 cycles. Color shifts from active to calm. Start/stop button. Progress indicator showing which cycle you're on.
interactiveOpportunities.technicalNotes: Use CSS animations or requestAnimationFrame. Total cycle = 12s. 4 cycles = 48s. Can repeat to fill 5 min (~25 cycles total).

interactiveOpportunities.description: Evening routine checklist: '7-8h planned', 'Screens off 30min before', 'Gentle stretching done', 'Breathing routine done'. Tappable checkboxes.
Input wake-up time -> outputs ideal bedtime (subtract 7.5h or 8h). Simple but useful.

sections.title: Mentalidad de Atleta
sections.subtitle: Tu mente es tu mayor aliada

duringEffort.label: Durante el esfuerzo
duringEffort.instruction: Reduce el dialogo interno. Usa palabras clave:

powerPhrases.label: Frases de poder
examples: Mi cuerpo es fuerte y resistente

miniHabit.label: Mini habito
miniHabit.instruction: Crea tu frase de poder. Primera persona, tiempo presente, en positivo.
miniHabit.inputPlaceholder: Escribe tu frase de poder aqui...

interactiveOpportunities.description: FLAGSHIP INTERACTIVE: User creates their own power phrase. Text input field with the 3 rules displayed. Example phrases shown as inspiration cards that can be swiped. Once written, the phrase is displayed in a 'medal' or 'banner' style card that can be saved/screenshotted. Validation hints: checks for first person ('Yo/Mi/Tengo'), present tense, no negative words.
interactiveOpportunities.technicalNotes: Store in localStorage for persistence. Could offer sharing functionality.

interactiveOpportunities.description: Guided prompt sequence: 'Close your eyes. Visualize your session. What will you accomplish? Set your intention.' Step-by-step with timed transitions.
During-effort keywords (Respira, Fluye, Sosten el ritmo) displayed as large, bold, swipeable cards. Minimalist focus mode.

sections.title: Nutricion Diaria
sections.subtitle: Lo que haces cada dia tambien entrena

guidelines.instruction: Incluye siempre proteina + carbohidratos de calidad
Reduce ultraprocesados en dias de carga

interactiveOpportunities.description: Daily nutrition checklist with the 4 guidelines as tappable items. Can be reset daily.
Visual indicator: 'Time since last meal' concept. Not a real timer, but an illustration showing 3-4 hour meal spacing across a day timeline (7am, 10am, 1pm, 4pm, 7pm).
Tappable checkbox: 'Do I have my snack today?'

sections.title: Estas dispuesto a mejorar tu rendimiento fisico?

content.mainMessage: El rendimiento se construye en lo que repites cuando nadie te ve.
content.closingPhrase: Entrena con estrategia. Entrena con Actimax.

interactiveOpportunities.description: Final CTA: A large 'Estoy listo/lista' button or swipe-to-commit gesture. Once activated, shows a personalized summary: their power phrase (from pillar 4), the 5 mini habits as a saved checklist, and the Actimax branding.
Compact summary of all 5 mini habits in one view, each as a small card with icon and one-line instruction. Serves as a 'cheat sheet' the user can revisit.
Option to share their commitment or power phrase via social/messaging. Brand awareness play.

flagshipFeatures.name: 80/20 Performance Chart
flagshipFeatures.description: Animated donut chart showing invisible vs visible training split. Tappable segments reveal items.
flagshipFeatures.techStack: SVG + CSS animations or lightweight chart library

flagshipFeatures.name: Breathing Exercise Timer
flagshipFeatures.description: Guided 4-2-6 breathing animation with expanding/contracting circle. 4 cycles. Visual + calming colors.
flagshipFeatures.techStack: CSS animations or requestAnimationFrame, optional Web Audio API for gentle tone

flagshipFeatures.name: Power Phrase Builder
flagshipFeatures.description: Text input with rules, example carousel, styled output card. localStorage persistence.
flagshipFeatures.techStack: Vanilla JS or lightweight framework component, localStorage

flagshipFeatures.name: Energy Planner Calculator
flagshipFeatures.description: Input duration -> output gel count, timing, drink volume. Simple math with styled output.

recurringPatterns.name: Before/During/After Timeline
recurringPatterns.description: Horizontal 3-phase timeline component. Reusable across pillars.

recurringPatterns.name: Mini Habit Checkbox
recurringPatterns.description: Single tappable checkbox with habit text. Can persist state in localStorage.

recurringPatterns.name: Product Mention Card
recurringPatterns.description: Small branded card showing Actimax product name, type, and context. Could link to product page.

recurringPatterns.name: Key Quote Block
recurringPatterns.description: Styled blockquote for motivational phrases. Italic, accent color, larger text.

appStructure.recommendedFormat: Single-page scrollable app with section-based navigation

navigation.type: Sticky top bar with pillar dots/icons + scroll-based section highlighting
navigation.quickJump: Pillar selector in overview acts as secondary nav

appStructure.responsiveness: Mobile-first design, content is inherently vertical/scrollable

persistentState.miniHabitsChecked: localStorage - which habits user has committed to

examplePhrases: Mi cuerpo es fuerte y resistente

allQuotes.text: No hay formulas magicas. Hay estrategia. Hay conciencia. Hay habitos.
Entrenar mas no garantiza rendir mejor. La clave esta en entrenar con energia.
El cuerpo ejecuta, si, pero lo hace guiado por la mente y limitado por la energia que lo sostiene.
Esto no es algo que simplemente aparece, se entrena.
No necesitas hacerlo perfecto. Necesitas hacerlo con intencion.
El rendimiento se construye en lo que repites cuando nadie te ve.
Entrena con estrategia. Entrena con Actimax.

miniHabitsSummary.habit: Lleva siempre tu termo. 500ml por hora de actividad.
Planifica tu duracion. 1 gel cada 30-40 min. 500-600ml de bebida por hora.
Rutina de respiracion de 5 minutos antes de dormir.
Crea tu frase de poder. Primera persona, tiempo presente, en positivo.
